summary: The diff implements REQ-1 completely by updating the color palette in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js with blue and green colors for both light and dark modes. However, REQ-2 is not addressed - no component files were modified to apply the new color scheme to navigation, cards, buttons, links, hero sections, or interactive elements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply the new blue and green color scheme consistently across all components including navigation, cards, buttons, links, hero sections, and interactive elements
missing_requirements.reason: No component files were modified in the diff. The frontend-file-summaries.txt lists many component files (Navigation.tsx, HomePage.tsx, etc.) but none appear in the MODIFIED FILES section, indicating they were not updated to use the new color scheme.
